checks.detail: SQLite pages and indexes are valid.
checks.name: sqlite_integrity_check

checks.detail: runtime_symbol_candidate_v1 is the complete review/browse surface.
checks.name: runtime_candidate_view_covers_lookup_rows

checks.detail: runtime_symbol_portrayal_v1 fails closed from complete named gate state, not just one flag.
checks.expected: view equals derived complete-gate-clear query, with 0 leaky rows
checks.name: runtime_portrayal_view_is_strict_gate_clear_surface

checks.detail: runtime promotion is structurally blocked unless every named required gate exists for the row.
checks.expected: 0 candidates missing any of 6 required runtime gates
checks.name: runtime_required_gates_cover_all_candidates

checks.detail: candidate_status/runtime_eligible agree with blocking and pending gates.
checks.name: runtime_eligibility_matches_gate_state

checks.detail: Each blocker row has gate name/status/severity/detail and valid JSON evidence.
checks.name: blocker_rows_are_queryable

checks.detail: The empty runtime surface is an approval gate state, not missing DB data.
checks.expected: 0 eligible and strict rows while visual approval is pending for every lookup row
checks.name: zero_runtime_rows_are_deliberate_fail_closed

checks.detail: The checked-in import audit has no hidden failures.
checks.name: import_audit_has_no_fail_rows

runtime_symbol_blocker_v1: one row per blocked or pending runtime_symbol_gate
every ineligible candidate must have at least one blocker row
gate_name, gate_status, severity, detail, and JSON evidence are mandatory
runtime_symbol_candidate_v1: one row per OpenCPN s52_portrayal_lookup row
broad browse/review surface; not runtime serving approval
runtime_eligible must agree with candidate_status and blocked/pending gate state
runtime_symbol_portrayal_v1: requires runtime_eligible=1, candidate_status=runtime_eligible, every named required gate present, zero blocking gates, zero pending gates
also excludes rows with any blocked or pending runtime_symbol_gate
